revision.comment: Restore content truncated by the legacy migration (3010-26384, guid-audit)
revision.text:
{{Company | Name=W4 Games | Guid=3010-26384 | Deck=On a mission to strengthen the open source Godot ecosystem by providing companies with the commercial products and services they need. | City=Dublin | State=Ireland | Website=https://www.w4games.com/ | Characters= | Concepts= | Developed_games= | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Published_games= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/183/1832043/3759198-901.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3759198-901.jpg","path":"183\/1832043\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_super,scale_medium,square_medium,square_tiny,scale_small,square_mini,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' />
W4 Games company created by Godot Engine veterans Juan Linietsky, Rémi Verschelde and Fabio Alessandrelli, and veteran enterpreneur Nicola Farronato.
On a mission to strengthen the open source Godot ecosystem by providing companies with the commercial products and services they need.
W4 Games was incorporated in Dublin, Ireland with a seed funding round that was led by OSS Capital (a leading investment fund in Open Source Software) and Lux Capital (a Silicon Valley giant) and also included investments from Bob Young, the founder of Red Hat, and Sisu Game Ventures, an early-stage venture capital fund focused on games.
The company has continued to grow and today has team members located in 12 countries around the world. The company recently closed a Series A round, significantly increasing its investor base.
==='''W4 Games Mission'''=== They want to help the video game industry reclaim their control on the technology powering their games, and reverse a dramatic trend where they have to rely on proprietary solutions from an ever-shrinking number of vendors.
With aim to make Open Source the industry’s first choice by ensuring that both enterprise and independent developers can use the community-developed Godot platform with peace of mind.
This should be achieved by W4 providing commercial products and services offering such as enterprise support plans and the possibility to access markets that were previously unreached by Godot, such as console platforms.
==='''GODOT'''=== W4 Games intends to play an active role in strengthening and professionalizing the Godot ecosystem while remaining as just another citizen of the community, as they believe that Open Source works best when individuals and companies benefit from each other’s contributions on a level playing field. This way, everybody wins and the project benefits as a whole.
All of their improvements made to Godot as part of the company’s activities will be donated back (whenever legally possible) to the community as pull requests to be reviewed and considered for inclusion.
Additionally, W4 Games pledges to support Godot financially with no-strings-attached donations to the project.

{{Company | Name=Wholesome Games Presents | Guid=3010-26250 | Characters= | Concepts= | Developed_games= | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Published_games=Games/Fishbowl_93273,Games/Is_This_Seat_Taken,Games/MakeRoom }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

revision.comment: Created page with "{{Company |Guid=46891c5b-e5c6-4ff8-99db-0013ccf8466a |Name=Wypok Games |Image=szkeletal background.jpg |Caption=Wypok Games Logo |Deck=An independent, one-man development powerhouse built entirely on irony, focusing on satirical games. |FoundedDate=2025-10-24 |City=Rzeszow |Country=Poland |State=Podkarpackie |Website=https://store.steampowered.com/search/?developer=Wypok%20Games }} Wypok Games is an independent, one-man development powerhouse that crawled out of the deep..."
revision.text: {{Company |Guid=46891c5b-e5c6-4ff8-99db-0013ccf8466a |Name=Wypok Games |Image=szkeletal background.jpg |Caption=Wypok Games Logo |Deck=An independent, one-man development powerhouse built entirely on irony, focusing on satirical games. |FoundedDate=2025-10-24 |City=Rzeszow |Country=Poland |State=Podkarpackie |Website=https://store.steampowered.com/search/?developer=Wypok%20Games }} Wypok Games is an independent, one-man development powerhouse that crawled out of the deepest, most questionable abysses of the Polish internet portal, Wykop. Built entirely on irony, the studio's very name is a deliberate misspelling and a parody of its origin, effectively making the entire enterprise a walking, structural joke. Currently, the studio channels 100% of its immense workforce into producing exactly one title: the ultimate parody game, "'''SZKELETAL: Estrogen Dracul's Potato Hunger'''". It is less of a traditional game studio and more of a sociological experiment that accidentally figured out how to compile code.

{{Company | Name=mazette! | Guid=3010-26382 | Deck=Video game publishing company, specialising in porting LÖVE and Godot Engine games to mobile and Nintendo Switch | FoundedDate=2022-05-24 | Address=86-90 Paul Street | City=London | Country=England, United Kingdom | State=Greater London | Website=https://mazette.games/ | Characters= | Concepts= | Developed_games=Games/SNKRX,Games/Torecower | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Published_games=Games/Arco,Games/Bad_Writer,Games/Catacomb_Kitties,Games/Gravity_Circuit,Games/Putrid_Shot_Ultra,Games/SNKRX,Games/Star_Seeker,Games/The_Case_of_the_Golden_Idol,Games/Understand | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/183/1832043/3759186-896.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3759186-896.jpg","path":"183\/1832043\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_tiny,scale_super,scale_medium,square_medium,scale_small,square_mini,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,scale_large","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Founded in 2021 by Cambridge graduate David Khachaturov. At it's inception company made LÖVE games and after some time expanded it's business by offering porting services for games made with Godot Engine.

revision.comment: Created page with "{{Company |Guid=287ea15b-7f18-44b8-bb02-ed2a9d2061a2 |Name=TransPerfect Games |FoundedDate=1992 |Country=United States |Website=https://www.transperfectgames.com/ }} TransPerfect Games is a trusted partner to global AAA developers and publishers, delivering end-to-end solutions that accelerate every stage of game development. From engineering, porting, and art production to localization, QA, player support, and live operations, the team combines deep industry expertise w..."
revision.text: {{Company |Guid=287ea15b-7f18-44b8-bb02-ed2a9d2061a2 |Name=TransPerfect Games |FoundedDate=1992 |Country=United States |Website=https://www.transperfectgames.com/ }} TransPerfect Games is a trusted partner to global AAA developers and publishers, delivering end-to-end solutions that accelerate every stage of game development. From engineering, porting, and art production to localization, QA, player support, and live operations, the team combines deep industry expertise with global scale and next-gen automation. Proprietary AI-enabled workflows reduce time-to-market and ensure consistency across assets, languages, and platforms. With a worldwide network of production hubs and testing facilities, TransPerfect Games enables seamless, high-quality player experiences in every region. Learn more at www.transperfectgames.com.

page.title: Concepts/28th Annual D I C E Awards

revision.comment: Restore image alignment, sizes and captions from legacy source (3015-13382)
revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=28th Annual D.I.C.E. Awards | Guid=3015-13382 | Aliases=DICE Awards 2025 | Deck=The 28th Annual D.I.C.E. Awards celebrate the best games of 2024, as voted by industry professionals. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/D_I_C_E_Awards,Concepts/Giant_Bomb_Game_of_the_Year_2024,Concepts/The_Game_Awards_2024 | Franchises= | Games=Games/Animal_Well,Games/Astro_Bot,Games/Balatro,Games/Batman_Arkham_Shadow,Games/Black_Myth_Wukong,Games/F1_24,Games/Helldivers_II,Games/Indiana_Jones_and_the_Great_Circle,Games/Metaphor_ReFantazio,Games/MLB_The_Show_24,Games/Tekken_8 | Locations=Locations/Las_Vegas,Locations/Nevada,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3676406-0487125902-Gg5AjXWX0AA2AeP.png}}
==Overview== The 28th Annual [https://www.giantbomb.com/interactive-achievement-awards/3015-4604 D.I.C.E. Awards] will be held February 13, 2025 in [https://www.giantbomb.com/las-vegas/3035-78 Las Vegas], [https://www.giantbomb.com/nevada/3035-2800 Nevada] during the 2023 D.I.C.E. Summit. The show will be hosted by [https://www.giantbomb.com/greg-miller/3040-156875 Greg Miller] and Stella Chung. ==Personal Awards== ===Hall of Fame=== * [[People/Ted_Price|Ted Price]] ===Lifetime Achievement Award=== * [[People/Don_James|Don James]] ==Game of the Year== {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===[[Games/Astro_Bot|Astro Bot]]=== * Developer: [[Companies/Team_Asobi|Team Asobi]] * Publisher: [[Companies/Sony_Interactive_Entertainment_America|Sony Interactive Entertainment America]] ====Runners-Up==== * [[Games/Balatro|Balatro]] ([[Companies/LocalThunk|LocalThunk]] / [[Companies/PlayStack|PlayStack]]) * [[Games/Black_Myth_Wukong|Black Myth: Wukong]] ([[Companies/Game_Science_Studio|Game Science Studio]]) * [[Games/Helldivers_II|Helldivers II]] ([[Companies/Arrowhead_Game_Studios|Arrowhead Game Studios]] / SIE) * [[Games/Indiana_Jones_and_the_Great_Circle|Indiana Jones and the Great Circle]] ([[Companies/MachineGames|MachineGames]] / [[Companies/Bethesda_Softworks|Bethesda Softworks]])||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/20/201266/3622132-3618933-0d05cb43413f28a641ac0c40fc272c70bbe194f6ade4b175c.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/20/201266/3622132-3618933-0d05cb43413f28a641ac0c40fc272c70bbe194f6ade4b175c.jpg|align=right|width=320}}

|} ==Outstanding Achievement in Game Direction== {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===[[Games/Animal_Well|Animal Well]]=== * Developer: [[Companies/Shared_Memory|Shared Memory]] * Publisher: [[Companies/Bigmode|Bigmode]] ====Runners-Up==== * [[Games/1000xResist|1000xResist]] ([[Companies/sunset_visitor_xie_yang_guo_ke|sunset visitor 斜陽過客]] / [[Companies/Fellow_Traveller|Fellow Traveller]]) * [[Games/Lorelei_and_the_Laser_Eyes|Lorelei and the Laser Eyes]] ([[Companies/Simogo|Simogo]] / [[Companies/Annapurna_Interactive|Annapurna Interactive]]) * [[Games/Riven|Riven]] ([[Companies/Cyan|Cyan]]) * [[Games/Thank_Goodness_Youre_Here|Thank Goodness You're Here!]] ([[Companies/Coal_Supper|Coal Supper]] / [[Companies/Panic|Panic]])||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/33/338034/3348322-7899756425-libra.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/33/338034/3348322-7899756425-libra.jpg|align=right|width=320}}

|} ==Outstanding Achievement in Game Design== {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===[[Games/Astro_Bot|Astro Bot]]=== * Developer: [[Companies/Team_Asobi|Team Asobi]] * Publisher: [[Companies/Sony_Interactive_Entertainment_America|Sony Interactive Entertainment America]] ====Runners-Up==== * [[Games/Animal_Well|Animal Well]] ([[Companies/Shared_Memory|Shared Memory]] / [[Companies/Bigmode|Bigmode]]) * [[Games/Balatro|Balatro]] ([[Companies/LocalThunk|LocalThunk]] / [[Companies/PlayStack|PlayStack]]) * [[Games/Helldivers_II|Helldivers II]] ([[Companies/Arrowhead_Game_Studios|Arrowhead Game Studios]] / SIE) * [[Games/UFO_50|UFO 50]] ([[Companies/Mossmouth_LLC|Mossmouth]])||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/20/201266/3622132-3618933-0d05cb43413f28a641ac0c40fc272c70bbe194f6ade4b175c.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/20/201266/3622132-3618933-0d05cb43413f28a641ac0c40fc272c70bbe194f6ade4b175c.jpg|align=right|width=320}}

|} ==Outstanding Achievement in Animation== {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===[[Games/Astro_Bot|Astro Bot]]=== * Developer: [[Companies/Team_Asobi|Team Asobi]] * Publisher: [[Companies/Sony_Interactive_Entertainment_America|Sony Interactive Entertainment America]] ====Runners-Up==== * [[Games/Call_of_Duty_Black_Ops_6|Call of Duty: Black Ops 6]] ([[Companies/Treyarch|Treyarch]] / [[Companies/Activision|Activision]]) * [[Games/Final_Fantasy_VII_Rebirth|Final Fantasy VII Rebirth]] ([[Companies/Square_Enix|Square Enix]]) * [[Games/Neva|Neva]] ([[Companies/Nomada_Studio|Nomada Studio]] / [[Companies/Devolver_Digital|Devolver Digital]]) * [[Games/Warhammer_40_000_Space_Marine_II|Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine II]] ([[Companies/Saber_Interactive|Saber Interactive]] / [[Companies/Focus_Entertainment|Focus Entertainment]])||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/20/201266/3622132-3618933-0d05cb43413f28a641ac0c40fc272c70bbe194f6ade4b175c.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/20/201266/3622132-3618933-0d05cb43413f28a641ac0c40fc272c70bbe194f6ade4b175c.jpg|align=right|width=320}}

|} ==Outstanding Achievement in Art Direction== {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===[[Games/Black_Myth_Wukong|Black Myth: Wukong]]=== * Developer: [[Companies/Game_Science_Studio|Game Science Studio]] * Publisher: Game Science Studio ====Runners-Up==== * [[Games/Indiana_Jones_and_the_Great_Circle|Indiana Jones and the Great Circle]] ([[Companies/MachineGames|MachineGames]] / [[Companies/Bethesda_Softworks|Bethesda Softworks]]) * [[Games/LEGO_Horizon_Adventures|LEGO Horizon Adventures]] ([[Companies/Guerrilla_Games|Guerrilla Games]] & [[Companies/Studio_Gobo|Studio Gobo]] / [[Companies/Sony_Interactive_Entertainment_America|Sony Interactive Entertainment]]) * [[Games/The_Plucky_Squire|The Plucky Squire]] ([[Companies/All_Possible_Futures|All Possible Futures]] / [[Companies/Devolver_Digital|Devolver Digital]]) * [[Games/Senuas_Saga_Hellblade_II|Senua's Saga: Hellblade II]] ([[Companies/Ninja_Theory|Ninja Theory]] / [[Companies/Xbox_Game_Studios|Xbox Game Studios]])||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/20/201266/3661208-1018858124-black.png|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/20/201266/3661208-1018858124-black.png|align=right|width=320}}

|} ==Racing Game of the Year== {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===[[Games/F1_24|F1 24]]=== * Developer: [[Companies/Codemasters|Codemasters]] * Publisher: [[Companies/Electronic_Arts|Electronic Arts]] ====Runners-Up==== * MotoGP 24 ([[Companies/Milestone_s_r_l|Milestone s.r.l.]]) * Night-Runners Prologue (Planet Jem)||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/0/1992/3692519-5767271970-EGS_F124_Codemasters_S2_1200x1600-4640c5c849df939a2303ab872d618530.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/0/1992/3692519-5767271970-EGS_F124_Codemasters_S2_1200x1600-4640c5c849df939a2303ab872d618530.jpg|align=right|width=320}} |} ==Role-Playing Game of the Year== {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===[[Games/Metaphor_ReFantazio|Metaphor: ReFantazio]]=== * Developer: [[Companies/Studio_Zero|Studio Zero]] * Publisher: [[Companies/Atlus|Atlus]] ====Runners-Up==== * [[Games/Final_Fantasy_VII_Rebirth|Final Fantasy VII Rebirth]] ([[Companies/Square_Enix|Square Enix]]) * [[Games/Dragon_Age_The_Veilguard|Dragon Age: The Veilguard]] ([[Companies/BioWare|BioWare]] / [[Companies/Electronic_Arts|Electronic Arts]]) * [[Games/Elden_Ring|Elden Ring: Shadow of the Erdtree]] ([[Companies/FromSoftware_Inc|FromSoftware]] / [[Companies/Bandai_Namco_Entertainment|Bandai Namco Entertainment]]) * [[Games/Like_a_Dragon_Infinite_Wealth|Like a Dragon: Infinite Wealth]] ([[Companies/Ryu_ga_Gotoku_Studio|Ryu ga Gotoku Studio]] / [[Companies/Sega|Sega]])||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/20/201266/3633864-1703384255-co8d9.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/20/201266/3633864-1703384255-co8d9.jpg|align=right|width=320}}

|} ==Sports Game of the Year== {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===[[Games/MLB_The_Show_24|MLB The Show 24]]=== * Developer: [[Companies/San_Diego_Studio|San Diego Studio]] * Publisher: [[Companies/Sony_Interactive_Entertainment_America|Sony Interactive Entertainment America]] ====Nominees==== * [[Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_25|EA Sports College Football 25]] ([[Companies/EA_Tiburon|EA Tiburon]] / [[Companies/Electronic_Arts|Electronic Arts]]) * [[Games/EA_Sports_FC_25|EA Sports FC 25]] ([[Companies/EA_Vancouver|EA Vancouver]] & [[Companies/EA_Romania|EA Romania]] / Electronic Arts) * [[Games/NBA_2K25|NBA 2K25]] ([[Companies/Visual_Concepts|Visual Concepts]] / [[Companies/2K_Games|2K Games]])||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/20/201266/3618941-ab184bf54d31c.jpg|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/20/201266/3618941-ab184bf54d31c.jpg|align=right|width=320}}

|} ==Stategy / Simulation Game of the Year== {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===[[Games/Balatro|Balatro]]=== * Developer: [[Companies/LocalThunk|LocalThunk]] * Publisher: [[Companies/PlayStack|PlayStack]] ====Runners-Up==== * [[Games/Caves_of_Qud|Caves of Qud]] ([[Companies/Freehold_Games|Freehold Games]] / [[Companies/Kitfox_Games|Kitfox Games]]) * [[Games/Frostpunk_2|Frostpunk 2]] ([[Companies/11_Bit_Studios|11 Bit Studios]]) * [[Games/Tactical_Breach_Wizards|Tactical Breach Wizards]] ([[Companies/Suspicious_Developments|Suspicious Developments]]) * [[Games/Satisfactory|Satisfactory]] ([[Companies/Coffee_Stain_Studios|Coffee Stain Studios]])||{{GBFigure|src=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/ignore_jpg_scale_small/8/87790/3664593-box_bal.png|full=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/8/87790/3664593-box_bal.png|align=right|width=320}}

|} ==Online Game of the Year== {| class='wikitable' style='margin:auto;width:100%;' |- | ===[[Games/Helldivers_II|Helldivers II]]=== * Developer: [[Companies/Arrowhead_Game_Studios|Arrowhead Game |} ==Presenters== * [[People/Rob_Pardo|Rob Pardo]] (Action, Adventure) * [[People/Tynan_Sylvester|Tynan Sylvester]] (RPG, Strategy/Simulation) * Andrew Eiche (Immersive Reality) * [[People/J_E_Sawyer|J.E. Sawyer]] (Story, Character) * [[People/Chelsea_Blasko|Chelsea Blasko]] (Fighting, Sports) * [[People/Shawn_Allen|Shawn Alexander Allen]] (Technical, Independent) * [[People/Mariel_Cartwright|Mariel Cartwright]] (Animation, Art Direction) * [[People/Ryan_Schneider|Ryan Schneider]] (Hall of Fame) * Sunni Pavlovic (Online, Mobile) * [[People/Kiki_Wolfkill|Kiki Wolfkill]] (Family, Racing) * [[People/Mike_Morhaime|Mike Morhaime]] & [[People/Amy_Morhaime|Amy Morhaime]] (Game Design, Direction) * [[People/Neil_Druckmann|Neil Druckmann]] (GOTY)

page.title: Concepts/29th Annual D I C E Awards

revision.text:
{{Concept |Guid=2a0ac30b-f585-46b2-b03d-ba3dc11b98f1 |Name=29th Annual D.I.C.E. Awards |Aliases=DICE Awards 2026 |Deck=The 29th Annual D.I.C.E. Awards celebrate the best games of 2025, as voted by industry professionals. |Concepts=Concepts/D I C E Awards |Locations=Locations/Las Vegas, Locations/Nevada, Locations/The United States of America |Games=Games/Hades II, Games/The Alters, Games/Clair Obscur Expedition 33, Games/Ghost of Yotei, Games/Ghost Town, Games/Mario Kart World, Games/Rematch 2025, Games/Death Stranding 2 On the Beach, Games/South of Midnight, Games/Mortal Kombat Legacy Kollection, Games/ARC Raiders, Games/LEGO Party, Games/Blue Prince, Games/Persona 5 The Phantom X |People=People/Evan Wells }} ==Overview== The 29th Annual D.I.C.E. Awards were held February 12, 2026 in Las Vegas, Nevada during the 2026 D.I.C.E. Summit. The show was hosted by Greg Miller and Stella Chung.
==Personal Awards==
===Hall of Fame=== * Evan Wells
==Game of the Year== ===Clair Obscur: Expedition 33=== * Developer: Sandfall Interactive * Publisher: Kepler Interactive
====Runners-Up==== * ARC Raiders (Embark Studios) * Blue Prince (Dogubomb / Raw Fury) * Dispatch (AdHoc Studio) * Ghost of Yōtei (Sucker Punch / SIEA)
==Outstanding Achievement in Game Direction== ===Clair Obscur: Expedition 33=== * Developer: Sandfall Interactive * Publisher: Kepler Interactive
====Runners-Up==== * Blue Prince (Dogubomb / Raw Fury) * Ghost of Yōtei (Sucker Punch Productions / SIEA) * Hades II (Supergiant Games) * Kingdom Come: Deliverance II (Warhorse Studios / Deep Silver)
==Outstanding Achievement in Game Design== ===Blue Prince=== * Developer: Dogubomb * Publisher: Raw Fury
====Runners-Up==== * ARC Raiders (Embark Studios) * Hades II (Supergiant Games) * Kingdom Come: Deliverance II (Warhorse Studios / Deep Silver) * Öoo (NamaTakahashi)
==Outstanding Achievement in Animation== ===South of Midnight=== * Developer: Compulsion Games * Publisher: Xbox Game Studios
====Runners-Up==== * Death Stranding 2: On the Beach (Kojima Productions / SIEA) * Ghost of Yōtei (Sucker Punch / SIEA) * The Midnight Walk (MoonHood / Fast Travel Games) * Monster Hunter Wilds (Capcom)
==Outstanding Achievement in Art Direction== ===Clair Obscur: Expedition 33=== * Developer: Sandfall Interactive * Publisher: Kepler Interactive
====Runners-Up==== * Death Stranding 2: On the Beach (Kojima Productions / Sony Interactive Entertainment) * Dispatch (AdHoc Studio) * Ghost of Yōtei (Sucker Punch Productions / SIEA) * The Midnight Walk (MoonHood / Fast Travel Games)
==Outstanding Achievement in Character== ===Erika Ishii as Atsu in Ghost of Yōtei=== * Developer: Sucker Punch Productions * Publisher: Sony Interactive Entertainment America
====Runners-Up==== * Aaron Paul as Robert Robertson III/Mecha Man in Dispatch (AdHoc Studio) * Jennifer English as Maelle in Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 (Sandfall Interactive / Kepler Interactive) * Laura Bailey as Courtney/Invisigal in Dispatch (AdHoc Studio) * Maxence Cazorla as Esquie in Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 (Sandfall Interactive / Kepler Interactive)
==Outstanding Achievement in Original Music Composition== ===Ghost of Yōtei=== * Developer: Sucker Punch Productions * Publisher: Sony Interactive Entertainment America
====Runners-Up==== * Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 (Sandfall Interactive / Kepler Interactive) * Herdling (Okomotive, Panic Inc.) * Mario Kart World (Nintendo EPD) * Sword of the Sea (Giant Squid)
==Outstanding Achievement in Audio Design== ===Death Stranding 2: On the Beach=== * Developer: Kojima Productions * Publisher: Sony Interactive Entertainment America
====Runners-Up==== * ARC Raiders (Embark Studios) * Ghost of Yōtei (Sucker Punch Productions / SIEA) * Lumines Arise (Enhance Games / Monstars) * Split Fiction (Hazelight Studios / Electronic Arts)
==Outstanding Achievement in Story== ===Clair Obscur: Expedition 33=== * Developer: Sandfall Interactive * Publisher: Kepler Interactive
====Runners-Up==== * Consume Me (Hexecutable LLC) * Despelote (Panic Inc.) * The Drifter (Powerhoof) * South of Midnight (Compulsion Games / Xbox Game Studios)
==Outstanding Technical Achievement== ===Death Stranding 2: On the Beach=== * Developer: Kojima Productions * Publisher: Sony Interactive Entertainment America
====Runners-Up==== * ARC Raiders (Embark Studios) * Assassin's Creed Shadows (Ubisoft Québec / Ubisoft) * Donkey Kong Bananza (Nintendo EPD / Nintendo) * Doom: The Dark Ages (id Software / Bethesda Softworks)
==Action Game of the Year== ===Hades II=== * Developer: Supergiant Games * Publisher: Supergiant Games
====Runners-Up==== * Absolum (Guard Crush Games & Supamonks / Dotemu) * ARC Raiders (Embark Studios) * Doom: The Dark Ages (id Software / Bethesda Softworks) * Ninja Gaiden 4 (Team Ninja & PlatinumGames / Xbox Game Studios)
==Adventure Game of the Year== ===Ghost of Yōtei=== * Developer: Sucker Punch Productions * Publisher: Sony Interactive Entertainment America
====Runners-Up==== * Blue Prince (Dogubomb / Raw Fury) * Dispatch (AdHoc Studio) * Donkey Kong Bananza (Nintendo EPD / Nintendo) * Hollow Knight: Silksong (Team Cherry)
==Family Game of the Year== ===LEGO Party=== * Developer: SMG Studio * Publisher: Fictions
====Runners-Up==== * LEGO Voyagers (Light Brick Studio / Annapurna Interactive) * Lumines Arise (Enhance Games / Monstars) * Marvel Cosmic Invasion (Tribute Games / Dotemu) * Popucom (Countersurge Salient / Gryphline)
==Fighting Game of the Year== ===Mortal Kombat: Legacy Kollection=== * Developer: Digital Eclipse * Publisher: Atari
====Runners-Up==== * 2XKO (Riot Games) * Capcom Fighting Collection 2 (Capcom) * Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves (SNK) * WWE 2K25 (Visual Concepts / 2K Games)
==Racing Game of the Year== ===Mario Kart World=== * Developer: Nintendo EPD * Publisher: Nintendo
====Runners-Up==== * F1 25 (Codemasters / Electronic Arts) * Kirby Air Riders (Sora Ltd. / Nintendo) * Wheel World (Messhof / Annapurna Interactive)
==Role-Playing Game of the Year== ===Clair Obscur: Expedition 33=== * Developer: Sandfall Interactive * Publisher: Kepler Interactive
====Runners-Up==== * Citizen Sleeper 2: Starward Vector (Jump Over the Age / Fellow Traveller Games) * Kingdom Come: Deliverance II (Warhorse Studios / Deep Silver) * Monster Hunter Wilds (Capcom) * The Outer Worlds 2 (Obsidian Entertainment / Xbox Game Studios)
==Sports Game of the Year== ===Rematch=== * Developer: Sloclap * Publisher: Kepler Interactive
====Runners-Up==== * EA Sports FC 26 (EA Vancouver & EA Romania / EA Sports) * PGA Tour 2K25 (HB Studios / 2K Games) * MLB The Show 25 (SIE San Diego Studio / SIEA) * NBA 2K26 (Visual Concepts / 2K Games)
==Strategy/Simulation Game of the Year== ===The Alters=== * Developer: 11 Bit Studios * Publisher: 11 Bit Studios
====Runners-Up==== * Drop Duchy (Sleepy Mill Studio / The Arcade Crew) * Europa Universalis V (Paradox Tinto) * The King is Watching (Hypnohead / tinyBuild) * StarVaders (Pengonauts / Joystick Ventures)
==Immersive Reality Game of the Year== ===Ghost Town=== * Developer: Fireproof Games * Publisher: Fireproof Games
====Runners-Up==== * Demeo x Dungeons & Dragons: Battlemarked (Resolution Games) * Marvel's Deadpool VR (Twisted Pixel Games / Oculus Studios) * The Midnight Walk (MoonHood / Fast Travel Games) * Thief VR: Legacy of Shadow (Maze Theory / Vertigo Games)
==Immersive Reality Technical Achievement== ===Hotel Infinity=== * Developer: Studio Chyr * Publisher: Studio Chyr
====Runners-Up==== * Ghost Town (Fireproof Studios) * Marvel's Deadpool VR (Twisted Pixel Games / Oculus Studios) * Star Wars: Beyond Victory - A Mixed Reality Playset (Industrial Light & Magic / Disney Electronic Content) * Unloop (Superposition NULL / CM Games)
==Outstanding Achievement for an Independent Game== ===Blue Prince=== * Developer: Dogubomb * Publisher: Raw Fury
====Runners-Up==== * Baby Steps (Devolver Digital) * Consume Me (Hexecutable LLC) * Despelote (Panic Inc.) * Dispatch (AdHoc Studio)
==Mobile Game of the Year== ===Persona 5: The Phantom X=== * Developer: Black Wings Game Studio * Publisher: Sega
====Runners-Up==== * Umamusume: Pretty Derby (Cygames) * What the Clash? (Triband) * Where Winds Meet (Everstone Studio / NetEase Games)
==Online Game of the Year== ===ARC Raiders=== * Developer: Embark Studios * Publisher: Embark Studios
====Runners-Up==== * Battlefield 6 (Battlefield Studios / Electronic Arts) * Mario Kart World (Nintendo EPD / Nintendo) * Marvel Rivals (NetEase Games) * Split Fiction (Hazelight Studios / Electronic Arts)
==Presenters== * REL Hunt (Action, Adventure) * Min Kim (Vince Zampella Memorial) * Jill Braff (RPG, Strategy/Simulation) * Johnny Galvatron (Audio Design, Original Music Composition) * Troy Baker (Story, Character) * Neil Druckman (Hall of Fame) * Rich Hilleman (Racing, Sports) * Mike Fitzgerald (Technical, Mobile) * Lee Petty (Animation, Art Direction) * Nico Bihary (Fighting, Online) * Shuhei Yoshida (Family, Independent) * Ed Boon (Design) * Todd Howard (Direction, GOTY)

{{Concept | Name=3D Goggle support | Guid=3015-13424 | Deck=An accessory for the Pioneer LaserActive. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/3D_Museum,Games/3D_Virtual_Australia,Games/Dr_Paolo_no_Totteoki_Video,Games/Goku,Games/Melon_Brains_Exploring_The_Mind_Of_The_Dolphin,Games/Virtual_Cameraman_2 | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/59/594908/3708465-1820014850-Laser.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3708465-1820014850-Laser.png","path":"59\/594908\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_small,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_super,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> An accessory for the Pioneer LaserActive.
